Economy & Taxation.position_summary: The Republican Party supports lower taxes for individuals and businesses as a driver of economic growth and job creation, and favors tariffs on imports to protect domestic manufacturing and reduce trade deficits.
key_policies: Significantly lower taxes for individuals and businesses
Sweeping tariffs on imports to protect American manufacturing
Reducing trade deficits with China and other competitors
Economy & Taxation.supporting_quote: Republicans support significantly lower taxes for individuals and businesses to stimulate economic growth and job creation.

Healthcare.position_summary: The Republican Party favors a market-driven healthcare system with reduced government regulation, and opposes key provisions of the Affordable Care Act.
key_policies: Market-driven healthcare approach
Less government regulation in healthcare
Opposition to Affordable Care Act mandates
Healthcare.supporting_quote: healthcare should be market-driven with less government regulation and we oppose the Affordable Care Act mandates

Climate & Environment.position_summary: The Republican Party prioritizes expanding domestic fossil fuel production and has withdrawn from international climate agreements, favoring energy independence over multilateral climate commitments.
key_policies: Expanding domestic oil, gas, and coal production
Withdrawal from the Paris Climate Agreement
Prioritizing energy policy through an economic and national interest lens
Climate & Environment.supporting_quote: on energy we support expanding domestic oil gas and coal production and have withdrawn from the Paris Climate Agreement

Immigration.position_summary: The Republican Party supports strict immigration enforcement measures, describing their approach as the most stringent in modern American history, with a focus on border security and limiting pathways to citizenship.
key_policies: Mass deportations of undocumented immigrants
Construction of a border wall
Ending birthright citizenship
Immigration.supporting_quote: the strictest immigration enforcement in modern American history including mass deportations border wall construction and ending birthright citizenship

Education.position_summary: The Republican Party supports expanding school choice and empowering parents with greater control over their children's education, including the use of public funds for private and religious schools.
key_policies: Support for school choice programs
Vouchers for private and religious schools
Parental rights in education
Education.supporting_quote: We support school choice and parental rights in education including vouchers for private and religious schools.

EU & Foreign Policy.position_summary: The Republican Party advocates for an America-first foreign policy that prioritizes national interests, expresses skepticism toward international institutions, and favors reduced foreign aid commitments.
key_policies: America-first foreign policy orientation
Skepticism of international institutions
Reduction or opposition to foreign aid
EU & Foreign Policy.supporting_quote: strong military spending and an America-first foreign policy that is sceptical of international institutions and foreign aid

Economy & Taxation.position_summary: The Democratic Party supports raising taxes on wealthy individuals and large corporations to fund public investment, while opposing tariffs they argue harm consumers and raise prices.
key_policies: Raising taxes on the wealthy and large corporations
Public investment in infrastructure, healthcare, and education
Opposition to tariffs on imported goods
Economy & Taxation.supporting_quote: Democrats support raising taxes on the wealthy and large corporations to fund public investment in infrastructure healthcare and education.

Healthcare.position_summary: The Democratic Party views healthcare as a fundamental right and supports expanding access to coverage, preserving existing legislation, and reducing prescription drug costs.
key_policies: Expanding access to healthcare
Protecting the Affordable Care Act
Lowering prescription drug prices
Healthcare.supporting_quote: We believe healthcare is a right and support expanding access protecting the Affordable Care Act and lowering prescription drug prices.

Climate & Environment.position_summary: The Democratic Party supports transitioning to a green economy through significant public investment in renewable energy and clean technology, viewing this shift as an opportunity for job creation.
key_policies: Major investment in renewable energy
Support for electric vehicles
Investment in clean technology and future jobs
Climate & Environment.supporting_quote: we support the green transition with major investment in renewable energy electric vehicles clean technology and the jobs of the future

Immigration.position_summary: The Democratic Party supports a humane immigration system that provides a path to citizenship for undocumented immigrants and ensures fair treatment of asylum seekers at the border.
key_policies: Path to citizenship for undocumented immigrants who have lived and worked in America
Fair treatment of asylum seekers at the border
A humane immigration system overall
Immigration.supporting_quote: a humane immigration system with a path to citizenship for undocumented immigrants who have lived and worked in America and fair treatment of asylum seekers at the border

Education.position_summary: The Democratic Party supports robust funding for public schools and opposes the use of taxpayer money for private school vouchers, viewing public education as a key area for government investment.
key_policies: Strong public school funding
Opposition to private school voucher programs
Raising taxes on wealthy and corporations to fund public investment in education
Education.supporting_quote: We support strong public school funding and oppose diverting taxpayer money to private schools through vouchers.

EU & Foreign Policy.position_summary: The Democratic Party supports maintaining strong alliances with NATO and the EU, emphasizing international cooperation, and opposes tariffs that they argue damage relationships with allied nations.
key_policies: Strong alliances with NATO partner nations
Partnership and cooperation with the European Union
International cooperation on global challenges
Opposition to tariffs seen as harmful to allied relationships
EU & Foreign Policy.supporting_quote: We believe in strong alliances with NATO partners the EU and international cooperation on global challenges.
